rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES B. WILSON DTD 4/13/88 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions; Specifically For Order: 1) Approving Settlement Agreement; 2) Establishing Terms Of Mutual Release And Deadline For Execution Of Same; 3) Clarifying How Much Of A $75,000 Loan To Ms. Petrocelli Has Not Been Repaid To The Trust; 4) Instructing That The Administration Of The Trust Shall Be Governed By The Terms Of The Settlement Agreement To The Extent That The Settlement Agreement Is Inconsistent With The Terms Of The November 15, 2016 Trust Instrument; And 5) Reserving Jurisdict
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Settlement Agreement provides that Frances Petrocelli will resign and David Keeler will be appointed successor trustee; however, the petition does not make this request. 2) Petitioner requests a determination that Frances Petrocelli owes a balance of $75,000 on her loan from the trust, but no substantiation has been provided. 3) Petitioner requests that specific terms of mutual release be ordered by the Court, which were not a part of the settlement agreement.
